task: Repair the FrankX mobile navigation, refine the ICP hero, and redesign the Mind Palace as a connected public venture blueprint.
surface: FrankX global mobile navigation, homepage hero, and Mind Palace section.
audience: Founders, creators, AI leaders, and sophisticated operators building owned AI systems, products, and operating leverage.
first_read: FrankX turns AI capability into an operating advantage and connects a real portfolio of systems, ventures, and creative work.

references.label: FrankX brand pack
references.reason: Defines clean technical luxury, direct founder language, and the emerald/cyan technical spectrum.

references.label: WCAG 2.2 pause, stop, hide
references.reason: Requires user control for automatically changing content that continues beyond five seconds.

references.label: Top agency pattern radar
references.reason: Supports one authored set-piece, a strong still frame, and mobile-specific composition without copying a reference site.

keep: Obsidian editorial canvas and restrained technical signal colors
Real public routes, ventures, products, and systems
Reviewed music release as optional studio proof
Native scroll, keyboard access, and reduced-motion behavior
avoid: A desktop graph compressed onto mobile
Generated text, stale counts, decorative 3D, and fake dashboards
direction.signature: A code-rendered architectural blueprint where real public systems assemble as connected rooms around the FrankX studio.
system: Tier A route and venture truth with Tier C code-rendered visualization
High-contrast emerald/cyan outcome language over the obsidian canvas
One GSAP corridor-assembly sequence using transform, opacity, and SVG stroke only
Static sequential mobile trail and complete reduced-motion final state
Accessible modal navigation with focus containment and restoration

asset_quality.why_premium: The blueprint is an exact, inspectable system visualization of verified FrankX ventures and routes rather than decorative imagery.

artifacts.notes: Mobile trigger and overlay integration; browser proof pending.
ICP promise, changing outcome color, pause/play control, and CTA hierarchy; preview inspection pending.
Desktop blueprint, mobile trail, and reduced-motion final state; preview inspection pending.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C is the correct medium for exact UI, routes, labels, relationships, and accessible interaction.

checks.name: contract-and-lint
checks.evidence: 11 navigation/homepage contracts and scoped ESLint pass.

checks.name: hero-outcome-contrast
checks.evidence: Emerald-200, cyan-200, and sky-200 endpoints measure 15.43:1, 15.86:1, and 14.91:1 against the #0a0a0b canvas.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Vercel preview and responsive capture follow the coherent commit.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop, mobile, tablet menu, and reduced-motion inspection are pending machine or cloud admission.

score.notes: Direction, specificity, accessibility design, and implementation pass; actual preview inspection is required before a ship score.

known_risks: Local browser QA and full build remain machine-gated while PP is in maintenance posture.
The complete estate is larger than the curated homepage map; the ecosystem route remains the exhaustive index.
